root_text.iti78:2.1: “Dhātuso, bhikkhave, sattā sattehi saddhiṁ saṁsandanti samenti.
root_text.iti78:2.2: Hīnādhimuttikā sattā hīnādhimuttikehi sattehi saddhiṁ saṁsandanti samenti,
root_text.iti78:2.3: kalyāṇādhimuttikā sattā kalyāṇādhimuttikehi sattehi saddhiṁ saṁsandanti samenti.
root_text.iti78:3.1: Atītampi, bhikkhave, addhānaṁ dhātusova sattā sattehi saddhiṁ saṁsandiṁsu samiṁsu.
root_text.iti78:3.2: Hīnādhimuttikā sattā hīnādhimuttikehi sattehi saddhiṁ saṁsandiṁsu samiṁsu,
root_text.iti78:3.3: kalyāṇādhimuttikā sattā kalyāṇādhimuttikehi sattehi saddhiṁ saṁsandiṁsu samiṁsu.
root_text.iti78:4.1: Anāgatampi, bhikkhave, addhānaṁ dhātusova sattā sattehi saddhiṁ saṁsandissanti samessanti.
root_text.iti78:4.2: Hīnādhimuttikā sattā hīnādhimuttikehi sattehi saddhiṁ saṁsandissanti samessanti,
root_text.iti78:4.3: kalyāṇādhimuttikā sattā kalyāṇādhimuttikehi sattehi saddhiṁ saṁsandissanti samessanti.
root_text.iti78:5.1: Etarahipi, bhikkhave, paccuppannaṁ addhānaṁ dhātusova sattā sattehi saddhiṁ saṁsandanti samenti.
root_text.iti78:5.2: Hīnādhimuttikā sattā hīnādhimuttikehi sattehi saddhiṁ saṁsandanti samenti,
root_text.iti78:5.3: kalyāṇādhimuttikā sattā kalyāṇādhimuttikehi sattehi saddhiṁ saṁsandanti samentī”ti.
root_text.iti78:9.1: Ayampi attho vutto bhagavatā, iti me sutanti.

translation_text.iti78:1.1: This was said by the Buddha, the Perfected One: that is what I heard.
translation_text.iti78:2.1: “Mendicants, sentient beings join together and converge because of an element:
translation_text.iti78:2.2: Those who have inferior convictions join together and converge with those who have inferior convictions.
translation_text.iti78:2.3: Those who have good convictions join together and converge with those who have good convictions.
translation_text.iti78:5.1: At present, too, sentient beings join together and converge because of an element.
translation_text.iti78:5.2: Those who have inferior convictions join together and converge with those who have inferior convictions.
translation_text.iti78:5.3: Those who have good convictions join together and converge with those who have good convictions.”
translation_text.iti78:6.2: they’re cut off by being aloof.
translation_text.iti78:6.3: If you’re lost in the middle of a great sea,
translation_text.iti78:6.4: and you clamber up on a little log, you’ll sink.
translation_text.iti78:7.1: So too, a person who lives well
translation_text.iti78:7.2: sinks by relying on a lazy person.
translation_text.iti78:7.4: a lazy person who lacks energy.
translation_text.iti78:9.1: This too is a matter that was spoken by the Blessed One: that is what I heard.
